UX & Graphic Designer

I'm a UX and Graphic Designer with a background in architecture and coaching — two disciplines that taught me how people move through spaces and how to communicate clearly under pressure.

I bring that same thinking to digital products and visual design: grounded in research, built around people, and designed to leave an impression.
